title: lass paniculata
intro: Lass paniculata, also known as Chinese skullcap or ba ji tian, is a perennial herb in the family Apiaceae, commonly found in China and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of lass paniculata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving symptoms of menopause, among others. Lass paniculata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
